sections.paragraph: emphat. st. אֱלָהָא m. Ch. i.q. Heb. אֱלֹוהַּ God, generally, Dan 3:28 6:8 , 13 emphat. st. specially used of Jehovah, Dan 2:20 3:32 . With pref. לֶאֱלָהּ Dan 2:19 but also with suffixes, contr. בֵּאלָהֵהּ Dan 6:24. Pl. אֱלָהִין gods, Dan 2:11 5:4 , 11 , 23 . בַּר אֱלָהִין “son of gods,” Dan 3:25.
